case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. JUAN CARLOS NOYOLA RIVERA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-07-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-07-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-07-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPORESNTED BY BY OSCAR GARICA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JUAN CARLOS NOYOLA RIVERA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVERA, JUAN CARLOS NOYOLA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
